meaning: n.高露洁(一种牙膏的商标名)
examples: His professional career started at Colgate University.
Sheffield's company was to become Colgate.
Your teeth will never look as perfect as the models' in Colgate ads.
Even Colgate, which calls adding a new color of dish detergent a product innovation, spent 2%.
Colgate-Palmolive Company had an annual average earnings growth of 8.4% over the past 10 years.
